Professional Telescoping Retractor Hardware for Trade Shows & Event Displays

Our telescoping retractor hardware provides the perfect foundation for professional banner displays at trade shows, retail environments, and corporate events. This durable aluminum construction hardware features an adjustable telescoping pole system that accommodates various banner heights while maintaining stability and portability.

The single-footed design keeps your banner display stable while maintaining a low profile footprint. The flip-open base design allows for quick and easy banner changes between events, making this hardware ideal for businesses that frequently update their promotional messaging.

Key Features & Specifications

  • Available in professional black or silver finish
  • Single-footed design for stability and portability
  • Flip-open base for easy banner installation
  • Flip-lever telescoping pole for quick height adjustment
  • Lightweight aluminum construction at 8.5 lbs
  • Compact dimensions: 34" W x 82" H x 15" D

Note: Banner graphics are sold separately and can be customized for your specific trade show or event needs.

Banner Specifications for Telescoping Retractor Hardware

While telescoping retractor hardware is sold separately, understanding banner requirements ensures optimal display performance with your new hardware.

Compatible Banner Specifications

  • Maximum Banner Width: 34 inches
  • Adjustable Height Range: Up to 82 inches
  • Recommended Materials: Vinyl, fabric, or mesh banners
  • Hardware Compatibility: Standard banner grommets or pole pockets

Banner Design Considerations

  • Design safe area within 32" width for optimal visibility
  • Consider telescoping height adjustment in design layout
  • Include grommets or pole pocket for hardware attachment
  • High-resolution graphics recommended for professional presentation

Banner Ordering Information

Custom banners designed specifically for telescoping retractor hardware can be ordered separately through our banner products section. Our design team can assist with sizing and specifications to ensure perfect compatibility with your hardware.

Setup Instructions

  • Open flip-base and insert banner attachment points
  • Adjust telescoping pole to desired height
  • Secure banner using flip-lever mechanism
  • Ensure banner is taut for professional appearance

Frequently Asked Questions About Telescoping Retractor Hardware

What banner types work with telescoping retractor hardware?

Our telescoping retractor hardware is compatible with vinyl banners, fabric banners, and mesh banners up to 34 inches wide. Banners should include grommets or pole pockets for proper attachment to the hardware system.

How much does the telescoping retractor hardware weigh?

The complete hardware assembly weighs 8.5 pounds, making it easy to transport to trade shows and events while providing stable banner display support.

What is the maximum banner size for this hardware?

The telescoping retractor hardware accommodates banners up to 34 inches wide and 82 inches tall when fully extended. The telescoping feature allows height adjustment for various display requirements.

Are banners included with the telescoping retractor hardware?

No, banners are sold separately. This allows you to customize your banner graphics for specific events while reusing the durable hardware for multiple applications.

How quickly can telescoping retractor hardware be set up?

The flip-open base and flip-lever telescoping system allow for setup in under 2 minutes. No tools are required for assembly or height adjustment.

What finish options are available for the hardware?

Choose from professional matte black powder coating or classic silver aluminum finish. Both options provide excellent durability and complement most branding requirements.

Can multiple hardware units be ordered for large events?

Yes, we offer volume pricing for multiple telescoping retractor hardware orders. Contact our customer service team for quantity discounts on orders of 10 or more units.

What is included with telescoping retractor hardware orders?

Each order includes the complete telescoping retractor hardware assembly with flip-open base, telescoping pole mechanism, and all necessary mounting components. Assembly instructions are included.
